metadata.title: S&P 500 CEO Compensation Data
metadata.description: CEO compensation data for all S&P 500 companies, fiscal year 2024
notes: Total compensation from Summary Compensation Table in proxy statements
Includes salary, bonus, stock awards, option awards, non-equity incentive, and other compensation
Stock awards valued at grant date fair value, not realized value
Pay ratios from company proxy statements per SEC Regulation S-K Item 402(u)
Some companies (e.g., Amazon) have low SCT totals because equity grants span multiple years
Tesla/Elon Musk has $0 compensation - correct per proxy filing
Some entries are FY2025 (ADSK, BBY, CRM, TJX, WDAY, NVDA, KMX) due to non-calendar fiscal years

companies.company_name: Bank of New York Mellon Corp/The
